item.title: A Rare Maintenance Find
item.description: Discover a rare maintenance find while working on a vehicle, highlighting the discovery, its significance, and how it impacts the repair or upkeep process.

item.title: 25-Year-Old Camry with Only 40K Miles
item.description: Explore a 25-year-old Toyota Camry with just 40,000 miles, highlighting its condition, longevity, and insights into maintaining a low-mileage classic car.

item.title: Costly Bolt Repair Explained
